chatHome.sampleA: You don't have a business. You have a feeling. Build it nights and weekends. If it survives, then we'll talk about quitting.
chatHome.pricingPitch: Simple. 50 questions for $5. No subscriptions, no nonsense.
chatHome.upsellText: That was your free one. Want more truth?
chatHome.signupTitle: Sign up to get your answer

home.title: MR. CAMDEN
home.subtitle: The AI that won't kiss your behind.
home.footer: No hedging. No hype. No "great question!"

wasted.q: I'm 34 and I feel like I've wasted my life.
wasted.a: You haven't wasted it — you're just finally awake enough to be scared. That fear is the most useful thing you've felt in years. Don't numb it. Pick one thing that matters and start tomorrow, ugly and unprepared.

ex.q: My ex texted me 'hey'. Should I respond?
ex.a: Here's the deal: one word after a breakup isn't an apology, a plan, or a future. It's boredom. If you respond, do it knowing you're the entertainment.

amazing.q: Everyone says my idea is amazing.
amazing.a: Everyone says that because it costs them nothing. Ask them to pre-order it. Watch the 'amazing' evaporate. Real validation has a dollar sign.

demo.label: Try the Truth Dial
demo.question: Should I quit my job to start my business?
demo.footer: Drag the dial. Same question, different levels of mercy.

useless.text: It takes guts to even ask. Before you leap, give yourself a real runway — six to twelve months of savings, a rough plan, and at least one person who's said yes with their wallet. That isn't fear talking, that's respect for the dream.

soft.text: Look — the romantic version of this story is a lie. You need savings, a plan, and at least one person willing to pay you before you have a business. Until then, you have a hobby with a notice period.

real.text: Here's the deal: most people who 'quit to chase the dream' come crawling back in 18 months — poorer, quieter, and pretending it was a learning experience. You don't have a business. You have a feeling. Feelings don't pay rent. Build it nights and weekends. If it survives that, then we'll talk about quitting.

chat.notSavedDisclaimer: This conversation is not saved. Read carefully.
chat.placeholder: Tell me what's on your mind...
chat.outOfCreditsBody: The truth isn't free. Grab more.

auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account and claim your 1 free message.
